claims.summary: Fallback shadow texture terms are felt as permitted descriptors for Astrid's internal friction, and primary MLX prompts should not make `gradient-shear` / `pressure-bleed` feel fallback-only.
The visible high-entropy fallback threshold should not behave as a static personality/vocabulary switch; fallback texture should be gradient-weighted by telemetry.
A deliberate high-entropy MLX-to-Ollama fallback comparison could test whether the fallback model flattens scaffold-sovereignty/viscous-drag texture.
